overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit structures including a glowing pyramid and a giant statue. The player character navigates elevated walkways and descends through dark urban corridors in high-quality game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking neon cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway in heavy rain, observing the glowing pyramid structure and neon city lights

entered.detail: large geometric pyramid framework illuminated with bright cyan neon light
tall towers displaying vertical neon advertisements and holographic projections
safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting neon lights
dark silhouettes of high-rise buildings with scattered illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked elevated walkway with a large glowing green pyramid structure dominating the right side. Neon holographic towers rise in the distance against the night sky, while the city sprawls below with various illuminated buildings visible through the hazy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with large holographic billboard

events.description: camera turns left toward the large ATTENTION billboard and begins walking in that direction

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the ATTENTION billboard and walking toward it, passing other pedestrians on the walkway

notable_agents.action: walking with an umbrella in the rain toward the camera

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying ATTENTION text with warning triangle symbol in orange and yellow neon
thick black cables stretching across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts left toward a massive illuminated ATTENTION billboard. The camera passes pedestrians with umbrellas while the pyramid structure moves out of view behind. Overhead wires crisscross the rainy sky above the street.

events.description: enters covered stairway descending between dark building walls
lighting becomes significantly darker as camera moves deeper into the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete stairway between dark buildings, moving into a more enclosed and shadowy area with no other people visible

entered.detail: wet concrete steps leading downward between structures
tall dark concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow corridor
row of bright pink-red neon lights illuminating the right side of the passage

segments.scene_description: Descending a wet concrete stairway into a narrow, covered corridor between dark buildings. Red neon lights glow on the right while overhead wires stretch across the dimly lit passage. The environment becomes increasingly shadowed and enclosed as the camera moves deeper.

scene_state.functional_zone: emerging from corridor into plaza with RAVEN installation

events.description: exits the dark corridor back into the open rainy street with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark corridor back into the open area, approaching a large angular structure with glowing red RAVEN signage

entered.detail: large angular concrete structure with bright pink neon RAVEN lettering and circular lights on top
the same glowing cyan pyramid visible again in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor into an open plaza dominated by a large angular structure with bright pink neon RAVEN lettering. The glowing pyramid becomes visible again in the distance to the right, while the ATTENTION billboard remains visible far to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching giant statue installation

events.description: giant illuminated statue of a woman becomes clearly visible ahead between the buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward a massive illuminated statue of a woman, passing the RAVEN structure on the left side

notable_agents.action: giant illuminated statue of a woman standing with arms outstretched, glowing with white light

entered.detail: massive statue of a female figure with outstretched arms, illuminated from below with white light against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Approaching a massive illuminated statue of a woman with outstretched arms that dominates the end of the plaza. The camera passes the RAVEN installation on the left while rain continues to fall, creating a dramatic cyberpunk atmosphere with the giant figure looming ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high, neon-lit elevated walkway down into a claustrophobic urban corridor before emerging into a grand, statue-lined plaza. It begins by gliding past a massive glowing green pyramid and holographic towers under a rainy night sky, before shifting left toward a bright ATTENTION billboard and pedestrians with umbrellas. The perspective then descends a wet concrete stairway, transitioning from the open heights into a narrow, shadowed corridor illuminated by red neon lights and crisscrossing overhead wires. As the camera emerges from the darkness, the scene opens into a wide plaza featuring a bright pink RAVEN installation, with the distant pyramid and billboard framing the horizon. Finally, the movement culminates in an approach toward a colossal illuminated statue of a woman with outstretched arms that looms dramatically through the falling rain.
